Sandbox_ArmorMakesSense_EnableThermalMod: When enabled, effective clothing insulation adds endurance burden during sustained body heat. Turn this off to remove AMS thermal burden.
Sandbox_ArmorMakesSense_EnableMuscleStra: When enabled, heavier armor adds extra vanilla melee muscle strain during combat. Turn this off to remove the armor-based strain effect.
Sandbox_ArmorMakesSense_EnableSleepPenal: When enabled, sleeping in restrictive armor reduces overnight endurance recovery and increases next-day fatigue. Turn this off to remove the armor-based sleep penalty.
